title: hieracium vulgatum subsp. tenellum
intro: Hieracium vulgatum subsp. tenellum, also known as low hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, characterized by its slender stems and small yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium vulgatum subsp. tenellum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of certain conditions.
